title: Man missing from Thembalethu
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Thembalethu police launched a search for Sibongiseni Botsman (41) from Ngcani Street, Thembalethu after he was reported as missing by his next of kin on 16 February.


> According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies, information available reveals that the man left his residence earlier the week and never returned.


He was dressed in a navy blue golf t-shirt, blue Chino trousers and black slippers at the time of his disappearance.

The investigation officer, WO Frank Goliath, urges the public to come forward with any information on the whereabouts of the missing man.

Anyone with information which could assist police in the search may contact the investigation officer at 044 802 8900 or 079 894 1576. Alternatively, information can be shared via Crime Stop at 08600 10111 or the MySAPS mobile application.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
